_comment: 3-frame smoke shot -- the FIRST GUI-session render test. tile_3_2 is the obelisk cell, 4.32M gaussians (~9.5 GB projected RAM, well under budget). auto_orbit frames the cell from its measured bbox so it cannot be mis-aimed; if frame 1 renders upside-down the true up is -Y (COLMAP y-down) -- a one-line flip for real shots. render_shot.log logs the real bbox + GL renderer + KIRI property names on this first run.
